title: Kawaii Coffee Dog Vector Illustration

imagePrompts.prompt: a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.fr:
Utilisez le prompt anglais ci-dessous pour générer l'image ; conservez les textes visibles, les noms de marque, les valeurs de variables et les paramètres en anglais.

a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2

a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2

以下の英語画像生成プロンプトを使用してください。表示テキスト、ブランド名、変数値、パラメータは英語のまま保持します。

imagePrompts.title: Kawaii Coffee Dog Vector Illustration

prompt: a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
originalPrompt: a cute kawaii cartoon {argument name="animal" default="dog"} holding a steaming {argument name="object" default="coffee mug"}, same white background with soft light green ground, centered composition, flat 2D vector illustration, soft outlines, pastel colors, adorable mood, text above: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2

promptTranslations.zh: 一只可爱的卡通{argument name="animal" default="狗狗"}，手里拿着一杯冒热气的{argument name="object" default="咖啡杯"}，背景为白色，地面为柔和的浅绿色，居中构图，扁平化2D矢量插画，柔和的轮廓线，马卡龙色系，氛围可爱，上方文字：“{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}” --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.fr: un mignon personnage kawaii {argument name="animal" default="chien"} tenant une {argument name="object" default="tasse de café"} fumante, même fond blanc avec un sol vert clair doux, composition centrée, illustration vectorielle 2D plate, contours doux, couleurs pastel, ambiance adorable, texte au-dessus : "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.ru: милый мультяшный персонаж в стиле каваи {argument name="animal" default="dog"}, держащий дымящуюся {argument name="object" default="кружку кофе"}, однотонный белый фон с мягкой светло-зеленой поверхностью, центрированная композиция, плоская 2D векторная иллюстрация, мягкие контуры, пастельные тона, очаровательное настроение, текст сверху: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.pt: um desenho animado fofo estilo kawaii de um {argument name="animal" default="cachorro"} segurando uma {argument name="object" default="xícara de café"} fumegante, mesmo fundo branco com chão verde claro suave, composição centralizada, ilustração vetorial 2D plana, contornos suaves, cores pastéis, clima adorável, texto acima: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.ja: かわいいカートゥーン調の{argument name="animal" default="犬"}が、湯気の立つ{argument name="object" default="コーヒーマグ"}を持っている様子。背景は白、足元は淡い緑色。中央配置のフラットな2Dベクターイラスト。柔らかな輪郭線、パステルカラー、愛らしい雰囲気。上部に「{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}」というテキストを配置 --ar 3:2
promptTranslations.ko: 김이 모락모락 나는 {argument name="object" default="커피 머그잔"}을 들고 있는 귀여운 카와이 스타일의 {argument name="animal" default="강아지"} 캐릭터, 부드러운 연두색 바닥이 있는 흰색 배경, 중앙 집중형 구도, 깔끔한 2D 벡터 일러스트레이션, 부드러운 외곽선, 파스텔 톤 색상, 사랑스러운 분위기, 상단 텍스트: "{argument name="text" default="No Coffee No Coddee"}" --ar 3:2
